article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The summary remains neutral, restating facts without adopting any loaded or emotive framing. Language mirrors AP’s straightforward tone and attributes statements appropriately.

custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All details are factual and/or attributed to the White House press secretary.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments are asserted by the model.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or emotive language; tone is matter-of-fact.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Only one perspective is present in the source; summary aligns proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes the key facts present in the article, including attribution to the White House.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives used are factual (e.g., ‘minor’ per the source) and attributed contextually.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced depiction consistent with source’s neutral tone.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of elite vs. grassroots sources beyond what the article provides.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Maintains AP’s neutral framing without added interpretation.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Summary attributes to the White House, but the sources_represented field lists AP instead of the White House/press secretary.
